title: gpt-image-2
prompt: Primary request: Cartoon flat illustration, bright warm color palette, humorous and fun, social media science article style, non-photorealistic, trendy internet vibe. Scene: Three cartoon cards in a row showing B-Roll superpowers: 1) First card (labeled '✨ 遮瑕救场') shows a B-Roll patch covering up an awkward jump cut in a video, like a band-aid fixing a broken video clip; 2) Second card (labeled '✨ 更好理解') shows a lightbulb turning on above a viewer's head while looking at a food close-up of steak with juice dripping; 3) Third card (labeled '✨ 防走神') shows a viewer's eyes popping back to the screen right as a new B-Roll clip appears. Big bold Chinese title at top: 'B-Roll三大核心作用'. 16:9 aspect ratio, clean light cream background, warm orange/yellow accent colors, cute and playful, no realistic details.
